onboarding.select_language_subtitle: Ilova qaysi tilda ishlashini tanlang. Buni keyin sozlamalardan o'zgartirishingiz mumkin.

habits.empty_state: Hali birorta odat qo'shmagansiz. Birinchi qadamni bugun tashlang.

notifications.reminder_daily: Bahona yo'q. Faqat harakat. Bugungi vazifangni bajar.
notifications.streak_lost: Zanjir uzildi. Lekin kuchli odam qayta boshlaydi — boshqa hech kim emas, faqat sen.
notifications.streak_milestone: {{count}} kunlik zanjir. Bu tasodif emas — bu intizom natijasi.
notifications.motivation_generic: Kim bo'lishingni har kungi tanlovlaring belgilaydi. Bugun ham tanla.

subscription.free_limit_reached: Free tarifda maksimal 3 ta odat mumkin. Cheklovsiz davom etish uchun Dark Elite (PRO) ga o'ting.
